styleGuide.camera: top-down 45 degree game icon and effect readability
styleGuide.renderStyle: 2D dark Three Kingdoms fantasy, crisp hand-painted game asset, high contrast edge lighting
styleGuide.palette: bronze gold, cyan energy, magenta cyber glyph accents, restrained dark ink texture
styleGuide.background: flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for later transparent PNG extraction
constraints: single centered object or single centered effect
no character, no text, no watermark
large silhouette readable at 48px HUD size
each level must clearly upgrade from the previous level without changing weapon identity
styleGuide.negativePrompt: side view, first person, 3D render, cartoon toy, low detail, blurry, noisy background, scenery, text, watermark, human character, multiple unrelated weapons, tiny unreadable object

weapons.name: 百炼环首刀
weapons.identity: ancient Chinese ring-pommel saber, heavy crescent slash identity
levelLanguage: Lv1: plain forged bronze-steel saber, small warm gold edge
Lv2: longer blade, brighter orange-gold cutting edge
Lv3: heated red steel veins and sharper crescent motion hint
Lv4: full moon slash aura, double-layer gold arc
Lv5: paired afterimage cuts, red execution glow
Lv6: legendary Guan-style saber, massive gold-cyan crescent, imperial seal glyphs

effect.prompt: Create a 2D top-down weapon attack effect, large crescent saber slash arc, gold core with cyan sharpened outer edge and red execution sparks, transparent-ready chroma key #00ff00 background, no character, no text, centered effect, crisp edge.
